name: logo-sting
title: LogoSting
description: Silent, restrained branded reveal: an SVG logo stroke draws in, a title settles beneath it, and a single accent underline lands last. A scene block composed strictly from DrawOn, ScaleIn, and Underline — no particles, no streaks, no flourish.
pickWhen: a brand sting at the head or tail of the piece — restrained scale + underline, not a 3D flourish.
